prerequisites.value: Brew Potion, Craft Wondrous Item; Knowledge (nature) 1 rank.

description.value: **Benefit:** You can cultivate magic plants. Cultivating a magic plant takes 1 week per 1,000 gp in its base price. When you create a magic plant, you make the same choices that you would normally make when casting the spell. Whoever consumes the fruit of the magic plant is the target of the spell.
